homepage.text_excerpt:
Homepage | Fortemix
Close video
High-quality industrial flooring Fortemix
Your partner in construction materials and chemicals since 1991
Products for the final treatment of cementitious surfaces
Versatile use indoors and outdoors
Wide range of colors for dry mixes and screeds
Fast delivery times
Continuous development and innovation of product parameters
More information
Introducing Fortemix
Close video
Fortelock PVC floor tiles
A real floor for the real world
A floor good for garages, warehouses and industry
Easy to put together and fast to install
A material you can rely on
You don’t need any special cleaning agents
A floor forever
More information
Introducing Fortelock
About Fortemix
This second generation of the Fortemix family company is focusing their efforts on the production of cement industrial flooring systems and PVC floors for industrial and commercial usage. Innovation, consistent development, a progressive approach and reliability have given Fortemix floors wide use throughout Europe and the USA.
More information
We chose the Fortedur 1030 dry mix because of its abrasion, scuff-proof and hardness parameters. Specifically because of the weight of our machines, the frequency of forklift operations and also the resistance of the floor to abrasion, if we can expect the particles generated during production will eventually land on it
Technician, PRORECO
Fortemix product line
Fortedur
Cement dry mix
Fortedur
Effective treatment for concrete floors. Select the type of dry mix according to the required load. Choose from several types of aggregates made from sand and sintered oxides up to metallic aggregates.
More information
Fortedur WET
Screeds for concrete floors
Fortedur WET
Cement screed for treating concrete floors. Choose from various types of aggregates, from sand to metallic aggregates, according to the required load
More information
Fortelock
PVC floor tiles
Fortelock
Interlocking PVC floor tiles for floating installations. These homogenous and heterogeneous tiles will give you a quick and effective floor for your garage, industry, warehouse, or commercial space.
More information
Fornivel
Cement-based self-leveling screeds
Fornivel
Use a self-leveling compound on cement floors as the final layer for industrial floors or as the base layer under an epoxide or polyurethane screed.
More information
FormulaForte
Curing and finishing coats.
FormulaForte
You can create a chemically-cured and aesthetically finished floor by applying worldwide unique coats from the FormulaForte series for aged concrete surfaces.
More information
Fortegrout
Cement-based grouts
Fortegrout
These highly fluid grouts are intended for filling in holes, grouting equipment and anchoring components to concrete.
More information
Forcem
Cement-based screeds
Forcem
Quick-setting Forcem is designed for the preparation of a leveling layer on concrete floors that require excellent flatness and adhesion to the concrete substrate.
More information
Fortecoat
Coatings for ce

products.text:
Overview of industrial flooring solutions | Fortemix
Products
Write Us
We can honestly say that insights from our past business activities and our experienced professionals have allowed us to build one of the most advanced and, in our market segment, most powerful production lines making materials for industrial floors and concrete floors in general.
The great emphasis placed on the quality of our manufactured products has ensured that quality control is an indispensable part of the system. This goes for both input and output materials, thanks to computer-driven testing equipment. This especially includes equipment for measuring wear resistance built on the basis of the English method of BCA, Vicat apparatus, instruments for the laser measurement of volumetric changes, or last but not least a computer-controlled press to measure compressive and flexural strength.
One of the other tools we use to check our products is the production monitoring system, which is immediately able to read all data about production and shipment from the information contained on the product.
Fortemix product line
Fortedur
Cement dry mix
Fortedur
Effective treatment for concrete floors. Select the type of dry mix according to the required load. Choose from several types of aggregates made from sand and sintered oxides up to metallic aggregates.
More information
Fortedur WET
Screeds for concrete floors
Fortedur WET
Cement screed for treating concrete floors. Choose from various types of aggregates, from sand to metallic aggregates, according to the required load
More information
Fortelock
PVC floor tiles
Fortelock
Interlocking PVC floor tiles for floating installations. These homogenous and heterogeneous tiles will give you a quick and effective floor for your garage, industry, warehouse, or commercial space.
More information
Fornivel
Cement-based self-leveling screeds
Fornivel
Use a self-leveling compound on cement floors as the final layer for industrial floors or as the base layer under an epoxide or polyurethane screed.
More information
FormulaForte
Curing and finishing coats.
FormulaForte
You can create a chemically-cured and aesthetically finished floor by applying worldwide unique coats from the FormulaForte series for aged concrete surfaces.
More information
Fortegrout
Cement-based grouts
Fortegrout
These highly fluid grouts are intended for filling in holes, grouting equipment and anchoring components to concrete.
More information
Forcem
Cement-based screeds
Forcem
Quick-setting Forcem is designed for the preparation of a leveling layer on concrete floors that require excellent flatness and adhesion to the concrete substrate.
More information
Fortecoat
Coatings for cement floors
Fortecoat
Treatment, penetration or curing coatings for concrete floors, under self-leveling screeds, or as the final layer of the substrate.
More information
